description: Single full-screen image with title and label. Blue-black bordered box. Shows suggestion text when no image is uploaded.

IMAGE_URL_1.description: URL of the image to display

LABEL_1.description: Caption shown at the bottom of the image

SUGGESTION_1.description: What image the user should upload for this slot (shown when no image is present)
SUGGESTION_1.example: Upload a photo of the crime scene entrance
